title: Resume project from phone lookup
description: Verifies a customer can enter a valid Spanish mobile number, submit, and be redirected into their project where the project form loads.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{VALID_SPANISH_MOBILE}} into the phone number field
Submit phone lookup
Verify the user is redirected into a project and the project form is displayed

title: Successful project submission after all checklist items are complete
description: Verifies the customer can submit a fully completed project and sees a success confirmation afterwards.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Complete all required sections in the flow until the review checklist shows everything complete
Scroll to the review section
Click review-submit-btn
Verify a submission success confirmation is displayed

title: Assessor can sign in and view submitted projects list
description: Verifies an assessor can authenticate to the dashboard and see the list of submitted projects.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Verify a list of submitted projects is displayed

title: Assessor can download the full project ZIP from project details
description: Verifies an assessor can download the complete ZIP archive for a project from the project detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Open a project's details from the projects list
Trigger download of the full project ZIP
Verify the browser begins downloading a ZIP file

title: Assessor can open a submitted project and view documents and extracted data
description: Verifies an assessor can open a project detail view and see uploaded documents and extracted fields.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Open a project's details from the projects list
Verify the project detail modal is visible
Verify uploaded documents and extracted data are displayed in the project details

title: Upload required property documents and proceed to province selection
description: Verifies a customer can upload identity, IBI, and electricity bill documents and continue to the province selection step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Upload a valid identity document front image
Upload a valid identity document back image
Upload a valid IBI document image or PDF
Upload a valid electricity bill with multiple pages
Click the continue control for the property documents step
Verify the province selection section is displayed

title: Apply all required representation signatures for Cataluña and continue
description: Verifies a customer can add a signature and apply it so all required Cataluña representation documents are signed and the flow can proceed.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Scroll to the representation signing section
Call window.__eltexFillTestSignature()
Click representation-continue-btn
Verify the representation step shows documents as signed and the flow proceeds to the next section

title: Complete the 4-step energy certificate survey, sign, and confirm
description: Verifies a customer can complete all survey steps, sign the certificate, confirm completion, and see it reflected as complete in review.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Scroll to the energy certificate section
Fill valid housing data into the step 1 required fields
Click energy-cert-next-btn
Fill valid openings and frame/glass data into the step 2 required fields
Click energy-cert-next-btn
Fill valid thermal systems data into the step 3 required fields
Click energy-cert-next-btn
Fill valid additional info into the step 4 required fields
Call window.__eltexFillTestSignature()
Click energy-cert-confirm-btn
Scroll to the review section
Verify the energy certificate item is marked as completed in the review checklist

title: Select Cataluña manually and continue
description: Verifies a customer can open the manual province list, select Cataluña, and proceed to the next step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Click the control to open manual province selection
Select the Cataluña province option
Click the continue control in the province selection step
Verify the next project step after province selection is displayed

title: Assessor can open an individual asset preview in a new tab
description: Verifies an assessor can open an uploaded asset preview from the project detail view in a new browser tab.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Open a project's details from the projects list
Click the action to view an individual asset
Verify a new tab opens showing the selected asset

title: Require DNI/NIE back image when only front is provided
description: Verifies uploading only the identity document front triggers a requirement to add the back before the user can proceed.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Upload a valid identity document front image
Click the continue control for the property documents step
Verify an identity document back-side requirement error is visible

title: Assessor can download an individual asset from a project
description: Verifies an assessor can trigger download of a single uploaded asset from the project details modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Open a project's details from the projects list
Trigger download for an individual asset
Verify the browser begins downloading a file

title: Select Madrid manually and continue
description: Verifies a customer can open the manual province list, select Madrid, and proceed to the next step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Click the control to open manual province selection
Select the Madrid province option
Click the continue control in the province selection step
Verify the next project step after province selection is displayed

title: Proceed from auto-detected province confirmation
description: Verifies that when the province is already auto-detected the customer can continue without manually selecting a province.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Click the continue control in the province selection step
Verify the next project step after province selection is displayed

title: Defer representation signing and continue without signatures
description: Verifies a customer can defer representation signing and still proceed, with signing remaining incomplete.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Scroll to the representation signing section
Click representation-defer-btn
Verify the flow proceeds to the next section without marking representation as completed

title: Review checklist supports fixing an incomplete item and returning to review
description: Verifies a customer can use the review checklist to navigate to an incomplete section, complete it, and return with updated completion state.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Scroll to the review section
Click an incomplete checklist item to navigate to its section
Complete the required action in that section to make it complete
Navigate back to the review section using the in-flow continue controls
Verify the previously incomplete checklist item is now marked complete

title: Show extracted identity fields after uploading DNI/NIE
description: Verifies that after uploading identity document images the UI displays extracted identity fields for customer review.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Upload a valid identity document front image
Upload a valid identity document back image
Verify extracted identity details are displayed for review

title: Submit is unavailable while required items are incomplete
description: Verifies the customer cannot submit the project from review until all required items are completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Scroll to the review section
Verify the submit action is not available while the checklist shows incomplete items

title: Assessor can log out and dashboard requires sign-in again
description: Verifies logging out ends the dashboard session and returning to the dashboard prompts for password again.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Log out from the dashboard
Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the dashboard sign-in form is displayed

title: Energy certificate can be skipped and marked as skipped on review
description: Verifies a customer can skip the energy certificate survey and the review reflects that it was skipped.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Scroll to the energy certificate section
Click skip-energy-certificate-btn
Scroll to the review section
Verify the energy certificate item is marked as skipped in the review checklist

title: Representation continue is disabled until a signature is provided
description: Verifies the customer cannot apply representation signatures until a signature is present on the canvas.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Scroll to the representation signing section
Verify representation-continue-btn is disabled

title: Assessor can export the projects list as CSV
description: Verifies an assessor can export the dashboard projects list to a CSV file.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Trigger export of the projects list as CSV
Verify the browser begins downloading a CSV file

title: Preview multi-page electricity bill upload
description: Verifies uploading an electricity bill with more than one page shows multiple previews/thumbnails.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Upload a valid electricity bill with multiple pages
Verify multiple electricity bill page previews are displayed

title: Preview uploaded IBI document
description: Verifies uploading an IBI document shows a visible preview or extracted IBI details in the property documents step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Upload a valid IBI document image or PDF
Verify an IBI document preview or extracted IBI details are displayed

title: Energy certificate back navigation preserves progress across steps
description: Verifies the customer can move forward and back within the survey without losing the ability to continue.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Scroll to the energy certificate section
Fill valid housing data into the step 1 required fields
Click energy-cert-next-btn
Click energy-cert-back-btn
Click energy-cert-next-btn
Verify the survey returns to step 2 and the user can continue the flow

title: Return to previous step from province selection
description: Verifies the customer can go back from province selection to the property documents step without leaving the project flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Click the back control in the province selection step
Verify the property documents section is displayed

title: Going back from representation returns to the prior section
description: Verifies the customer can navigate back from the representation section to the previous step in the flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Scroll to the representation signing section
Click representation-back-btn
Verify the user is returned to the previous section in the project flow

title: Show not-found error for unknown phone number
description: Verifies entering an unknown phone number shows a not-found error and keeps the customer on the phone lookup screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill 600000000 into the phone number field
Submit phone lookup
Verify a phone not found error is visible

title: Block invalid Spanish mobile number format
description: Verifies an invalid phone number format prevents lookup submission and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill 12345 into the phone number field
Submit phone lookup
Verify a phone number validation error is visible
